user.title: My Honda+
user.description: Enter your My Honda+ account credentials

data.car_refresh_interval: Refresh from car interval (seconds, 0 to disable)

data_description.email: Email address used to sign in to the My Honda+ app.
data_description.password: Password for your My Honda+ account.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant polls Honda's cached vehicle data.
data_description.car_refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant wakes the vehicle for fresh status data. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.location_refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant requests fresh GPS data from the vehicle. Set to 0 to disable.

select_vehicle.title: Select vehicle
select_vehicle.description: Multiple vehicles found on your account. Select which one to add.

data_description.vin: Choose the vehicle from your My Honda+ account that should be added to Home Assistant.

manual_vin.title: Enter VIN
manual_vin.description: Could not auto-detect vehicles. Enter the VIN manually.

data_description.vin: Enter the VIN exactly as reported by Honda if automatic vehicle detection did not work.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.description: Honda sent a verification email. Copy the link URL from the email (do NOT click it) and paste it below.

data_description.verification_link: Paste the full verification URL from the Honda email.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate My Honda+
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

data_description.email: Email address used to sign in to the My Honda+ app.
data_description.password: Password for your My Honda+ account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Honda API
error.account_locked: Account is locked. Try again later.
error.invalid_link: Could not parse verification link. Copy the full URL.

data.car_refresh_interval: Refresh from car interval (seconds, 0 to disable)

data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant polls Honda's cached vehicle data.
data_description.car_refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant wakes the vehicle for fresh status data. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.location_refresh_interval: How often Home Assistant requests fresh GPS data from the vehicle. Set to 0 to disable.

refresh_data_failed.message: Unable to refresh data from vehicle

send_command_failed.message: Unable to send command to vehicle

refresh_location_failed.message: Unable to refresh location from vehicle

config_entry_not_found.message: Failed to call service {service}. Config entry {entry_id} not found

config_entry_not_loaded.message: Failed to call service {service}. Config entry {entry_id} not loaded

config_entry_no_data.message: Failed to call service {service}. Config entry {entry_id} has no runtime data
